WELCOME.ABOUT_BRUNO: Opensource IDE for exploring and testing APIs
WELCOME.COLLECTION_IMPORT_ERROR: An error occurred while importing the collection. Check the logs for more information.
WELCOME.COLLECTION_OPEN_ERROR: An error occurred while opening the collection
WELCOME.GLOBAL_SEARCH_TIP_PART3: (windows) anytime to quickly search collections, folders, and requests
WELCOME.TITLE: Welcome to Bruno
WELCOME.TAGLINE: A fast, Git-friendly, and open-source API client.
WELCOME.ALL_SET_DESCRIPTION: Create a new collection to start building requests, or import one you already have.
WELCOME.OPEN_EXISTING_COLLECTION_DESC: Open a Bruno collection from your filesystem
WELCOME.START_WITH_REQUEST_DESC: Jump right in with a new HTTP request
WELCOME.CREATE_COLLECTION_DESC: Start fresh with a new API collection
WELCOME.IMPORT_COLLECTION_DESC: Bring in Postman, OpenAPI/Swagger, or Insomnia
WELCOME.FILESYSTEM_ONLY_DESC: Collections are plain files on your disk. No cloud sync, no proprietary lock-in.
WELCOME.GIT_FRIENDLY_DESC: Every request is a readable file. Commit, branch, review, and collaborate using the tools you already know.
WELCOME.PRIVACY_FOCUSED_DESC: No account, no login. Bruno works entirely offline, your API keys never leave your machine.
WELCOME.FAST_LIGHTWEIGHT_DESC: Built to be snappy. No bloated runtimes, just a fast, focused tool for exploring and testing APIs.
WELCOME.CHOOSE_THEME_DESCRIPTION: Pick a look that feels right. You can always change this later in Preferences.
WELCOME.STORAGE_TITLE: Where should we store your collections?
WELCOME.STORAGE_DESCRIPTION: Bruno saves collections as plain files on your filesystem, perfect for version control with Git.
WELCOME.STORAGE_HINT: Each collection and workspace gets its own folder inside this directory. You can change this later.

WORKSPACE_OVERVIEW.PREPARE_CREATE_ERROR: Error preparing workspace for collection creation
WORKSPACE_OVERVIEW.OPEN_COLLECTION_ERROR: An error occurred while opening the collection

CREATE_COLLECTION.TITLE: Create Collection
CREATE_COLLECTION.PATH_HELP_1: Bruno stores your collections on your computer's filesystem.
CREATE_COLLECTION.PATH_HELP_2: Choose the location where you want to store this collection.
CREATE_COLLECTION.FOLDER_NAME_HELP_1: The name of the folder used to store the collection.
CREATE_COLLECTION.FOLDER_NAME_HELP_2: You can choose a folder name different from your collection's name or one compatible with filesystem rules.
CREATE_COLLECTION.FILE_FORMAT_HELP_1: Choose the file format for storing requests in this collection.
CREATE_COLLECTION.FILE_FORMAT_HELP_3: BRU: Bruno's native file format (.bru files)
CREATE_COLLECTION.ERROR_CREATING_COLLECTION: An error occurred while creating the collection

NEW_FOLDER.TITLE: New Folder
NEW_FOLDER.FILESYSTEM_FOLDER_NAME_HELP: You can choose to save the folder as a different name on your file system versus what is displayed in the app.
NEW_FOLDER.CREATE_FOLDER_ERROR: An error occurred while adding the folder
NEW_FOLDER.RESERVED_ENVIRONMENTS_ERROR: The folder name "environments" at the root of the collection is reserved in bruno

NEW_REQUEST.CREATE_REQUEST_ERROR: An error occurred while creating the request

IMPORT_COLLECTION.TITLE: Import Collection
IMPORT_COLLECTION.VALID_GIT_URL: Please enter a valid git repository URL
IMPORT_COLLECTION.URL_IMPORT_FAILED: URL import failed. Please check the URL and try again.
IMPORT_COLLECTION.URL_PLACEHOLDER: Enter URL (OpenAPI/Swagger, Postman, or Insomnia specification)
IMPORT_COLLECTION.SUPPORTED_FORMATS: Supports Bruno, OpenCollection, Postman, Insomnia, OpenAPI 3.x / Swagger 2.0, WSDL, and ZIP formats
IMPORT_COLLECTION.PARSE_FILE_ERROR: Failed to parse the file – ensure it is valid JSON or YAML
IMPORT_COLLECTION.INVALID_BRUNO_ZIP: The ZIP file is not a valid Bruno collection
IMPORT_COLLECTION.NO_VALID_COLLECTIONS: No valid collections found in the selected files
IMPORT_COLLECTION.ZIP_MIX_ERROR: Cannot mix ZIP files with other file types. Please select either a single ZIP file OR collection files (JSON/YAML)
IMPORT_COLLECTION.MULTIPLE_ZIP_ERROR: Multiple ZIP files selected. Please select only one ZIP file at a time for import.

IMPORT_COLLECTION_LOCATION.FILESYSTEM_HELP_1: Bruno stores your collections on your computer's filesystem.
IMPORT_COLLECTION_LOCATION.FILESYSTEM_HELP_2: Choose the location where you want to store this collection.
IMPORT_COLLECTION_LOCATION.FILE_FORMAT_HELP_1: Choose the file format for storing requests in this collection.
IMPORT_COLLECTION_LOCATION.FILE_FORMAT_HELP_3: BRU: Bruno's native file format (.bru files)
IMPORT_COLLECTION_LOCATION.FOLDER_ARRANGEMENT_DESC: Select whether to create folders according to the spec's paths or tags.
IMPORT_COLLECTION_LOCATION.CHECK_FOR_SPEC_UPDATES_UNSUPPORTED: OpenAPI Sync is not supported for Swagger 2.0 specs.
IMPORT_COLLECTION_LOCATION.CHECK_FOR_SPEC_UPDATES_HELP: Stay notified of spec changes and sync your collection with the spec.

BULK_IMPORT.TITLE: Bulk Import
BULK_IMPORT.GLOBAL_ENVIRONMENT_INFO: Environments will be imported and stored as global, accessible across collections.
BULK_IMPORT.DUPLICATE_ACROSS_COLLECTIONS_INFO: Each imported collection will receive its own copy of the environments.
BULK_IMPORT.SELECT_LOCATION_PLACEHOLDER: Select a location to save the collection
BULK_IMPORT.FILE_FORMAT_HELP_1: Choose the file format for storing requests in this collection.
BULK_IMPORT.FILE_FORMAT_HELP_3: BRU: Bruno's native file format (.bru files)
BULK_IMPORT.FOLDER_ARRANGEMENT_DESC: Select whether to create folders according to the spec's paths or tags.

CLOSE_WORKSPACE.CLOSE_ERROR: An error occurred while closing the workspace
CLOSE_WORKSPACE.TITLE: Close Workspace
CLOSE_WORKSPACE.CONFIRM_MESSAGE: Are you sure you want to close workspace {{name}}?
CLOSE_WORKSPACE.INFO_MESSAGE: It will still be available in the file system at the above location and can be re-opened later.
